articles.title: Stellantis: Expanded Qualcomm Partnership To Power Next-Generation Vehicles With Snapdragon Digital Chassis
articles.summary: Stellantis and Qualcomm have expanded their multi-year technology collaboration, integrating Qualcomm's Snapdragon Digital Chassis system-on-chips into Stellantis' STLA Brain platform. This partnership aims to enhance cockpit, connectivity, and ADAS performance across Stellantis' global vehicle portfolio, accelerating time to market and supporting continuous feature upgrades. The agreement also includes the Snapdragon Ride Pilot ADAS platform, enabling advanced driver assistance features, and a non-binding letter of intent for Stellantis-owned aiMotive to join Qualcomm Technologies.
articles.content: Stellantis and Qualcomm have expanded their multi-year technology collaboration, integrating Qualcomm's Snapdragon Digital Chassis system-on-chips into Stellantis' STLA Brain platform. This partnership aims to enhance cockpit, connectivity, and ADAS performance across Stellantis' global vehicle portfolio, accelerating time to market and supporting continuous feature upgrades. The agreement also includes the Snapdragon Ride Pilot ADAS platform, enabling advanced driver assistance features, and a non-binding letter of intent for Stellantis-owned aiMotive to join Qualcomm Technologies.

articles.title: Boeing (BA) Stock: Citi Calls the Selloff a Gift — Here’s Why
articles.summary: Citi has raised its price target for Boeing (BA) to $260 from $256, maintaining a "Buy" rating, and viewing the recent selloff in aerospace and defense stocks as a buying opportunity. The bank highlights Boeing's strong Q1 performance, particularly in its defense segment, with a 21% revenue increase and a record $86 billion backlog. Despite challenges in its commercial sector, the company saw significant earnings beats, a substantial order from China, and insider stock purchases, reinforcing Citi's bullish outlook.

The fund now owns 360,104 shares, valued at $133.22 million. Other hedge funds have shown varied activity with American Express stock, while the company itself recently increased its quarterly dividend.

articles.title: Swedbank AB Grows Stock Holdings in AutoZone, Inc. $AZO
articles.summary: Swedbank AB increased its stake in AutoZone, Inc. by 6.9% in the fourth quarter, bringing its total holdings to 33,479 shares valued at $113.5 million. articles.title: Swedbank AB Purchases 11,111 Shares of Lowe's Companies, Inc. $LOW
articles.summary: Swedbank AB increased its stake in Lowe's Companies, Inc. by 2.9% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 11,111 shares and bringing its total holdings to 394,716 shares valued at approximately $95.2 million. This move comes as Lowe's reported strong Q1 earnings, beating EPS estimates, yet the stock saw a slight decline and analysts issued more cautious price targets. The company maintained its FY 2026 guidance despite concerns about DIY demand and housing headwinds.

articles.title: Swedbank AB Sells 13,026 Shares of eBay Inc. $EBAY
articles.summary: Swedbank AB reduced its stake in eBay Inc. by 0.8% in Q4, selling 13,026 shares and owning 1,576,795 shares valued at $137.34 million. This article also covers other institutional investor activities, analyst ratings with an average target price of $107.90, recent insider selling, and eBay's financial performance. Notably, GameStop's increased exposure to eBay through derivatives has fueled takeover speculation, impacting market sentiment, which has led to eBay's stock being up over 50% in the past year.

articles.title: Swedbank AB Boosts Stake in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. $REGN
articles.summary: Swedbank AB increased its stake in Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) by 9.8% in the fourth quarter, now owning 227,779 shares valued at $175.82 million. Various other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in REGN, which currently holds a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average target price of $792.65. Regeneron recently reported strong early results for Lynozyfic and regulatory progress for Otarmeni, but also faced concerns after the fianlimab melanoma trial missed its primary endpoint.

articles.title: In flurry of trading activity, Trump purchases John Deere stock
articles.summary: Donald Trump's investment portfolio has purchased John Deere stock on three occasions since January, according to his recent financial disclosure. These purchases were part of thousands of trades made in recent months, some of which involved companies with business before the Trump administration. Despite the appearance of conflicts of interest, a White House spokesperson maintains that there are none.
articles.content: Donald Trump's investment portfolio has purchased John Deere stock on three occasions since January, according to his recent financial disclosure. These purchases were part of thousands of trades made in recent months, some of which involved companies with business before the Trump administration. Despite the appearance of conflicts of interest, a White House spokesperson maintains that there are none.

articles.title: William Blair Investment Management LLC Buys 148,950 Shares of Oracle Corporation $ORCL
articles.summary: William Blair Investment Management LLC increased its stake in Oracle Corporation by 13.4% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 148,950 shares, bringing its total holdings to 1,256,536 shares valued at approximately $244.9 million. Oracle recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations with an EPS of $1.79 and revenue of $17.19 billion, a 21.7% year-over-year increase. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for ORCL with an average price target of $261.46, despite some recent target price cuts.

articles.title: Moody's Corporation $MCO is TRB Advisors LP's 8th Largest Position

articles.title: The Boeing Company stock (US0970231058): Q1 revenue climbs as investors weigh legal overhangs and va
articles.summary: Boeing reported double-digit revenue growth and a narrower Q1 loss, exceeding analyst expectations. Despite operational progress, the stock trades below previous peaks due to ongoing investor concerns about legal risks, market valuation, and the pace of aerospace recovery. The company remains a critical component of US indices and aerospace economy, making it a closely watched stock for investors.
